title: [OM] [Evaluator] Cache is not working as intended
body:
```mlir
import circt
from circt.dialects import om
from circt.ir import Context, InsertionPoint, Location, Module

with Context() as ctx, Location.unknown():
  circt.register_dialects(ctx)

  module = Module.parse("""
  module {
    om.class @Test(%param: i64) {
      %0 = om.object @Child(%param) : (i64) -> !om.class.type<@Child>
      om.class.field @child, %0 : !om.class.type<@Child>
    }

    om.class @Child(%0: i64) {
      om.class.field @foo, %0 : i64
    }

  }
  """)

  evaluator = om.Evaluator(module)

obj = evaluator.instantiate("Test", 41)
print(obj.child.foo)
obj = evaluator.instantiate("Test", 42)
print(obj.child.foo)
```

Current output is:
```
41
41
```
The second line must be `42`. The bug is currently we use `Value` as key of cache but it is not correct when actual parameters are different.
